title: Maintenance condition sensing device
abstract: A method for monitoring a maintenance condition of a component (105) includes coupling a sensing device (100) to the component (105). The sensing device (100) includes at least one non-intrusive data sensor (115) and an on-board processing complex (120) including a wireless communication device (155) and being coupled to the at least one non-intrusive data sensor (115). Data from the at least one non-intrusive data sensor (115) is processed in the on-board processing complex (120) using a maintenance model (175) to determine a maintenance condition metric for the component (105). The maintenance condition metric is transmitted to a remote system (180) using the wireless communication device (155).
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  WE CLAIM: 1 . A method for monitoring a maintenance condition of a component (105), comprising: coupling a sensing device (100) to said component (105), said sensing device (100) including at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) and an onboard processing complex (120) including a wireless communication device (155) and being coupled to said at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15); processing data from said at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) in said on-board processing complex (120) using a maintenance model (175) to determine a maintenance condition metric for said component (105); and transmitting said maintenance condition metric to a remote system (180) using said wireless communication device (155). 2. The method of claim 1 , further comprising: generating an operational recommendation based on said maintenance condition metric; and transmitting said operational recommendation to said remote system (180) using said wireless communication device (155). 3. The method of claim 2, wherein generating said operational recommendation comprises generating a graded indicator of a maintenance condition of said component (105). 4. The method of claim 1 , wherein determining said maintenance condition metric comprises determining a remaining useful life of said component (105). 5. The method of claim 1 , wherein said sensing device (100) comprises a flexible body (1 10), said at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) and said processing complex (120) are coupled to said flexible body (1 10), and coupling said 

 sensing device (100) comprises wrapping said flexible body (1 10) around at least a portion of said component (105). 6. The method of claim 5, wherein coupling said sensing device (100) further comprises attaching a housing (135) around said flexible body (1 10). 7. The method of claim 5, wherein lines (125, 130) are embedded in said flexible body (1 10) coupling said at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) to said processing complex (120). 8. The method of claim 1 , wherein said at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) comprises a strain gauge (1 15(4)), and processing data from said at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) using said maintenance model (175) comprises estimating a wall thickness of said component (105). 9. The method of claim 1 , wherein said at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) comprises a vibration sensor (1 15)(1 )), and processing data from said at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) using said maintenance model (175) comprises determining a duty cycle of said component (105) and estimating a wall thickness of said component (105) based on said duty cycle. 10. The method of claim 1 , wherein said sensing device (100) comprises a location module (150), and the method further comprises transmitting location data associated with said sensing device (100) to said remote system (180). 1 1 . The method of claim 1 , further comprising processing data from said at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) in said on-board processing complex (120) using said maintenance model (175) to determine a maintenance condition metric for an additional component proximate said component (105). 12. A device (100) comprising: a flexible body (1 10); at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) coupled to said flexible body (1 10); and 

 a processing complex (120) including a wireless communication device (155) coupled to said at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) and said flexible body (1 10), wherein said processing complex (120) is to process data from said at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) using a maintenance model (175) to determine a maintenance condition metric for a component (105) to which said device (100) is coupled and transmit said maintenance condition metric to a remote system (180) using said wireless communication device (155). 13. The device (100) of claim 12, wherein said processing complex (120) is to generate an operational recommendation based on said maintenance condition metric and transmit said operational recommendation to said remote system (180) using said wireless communication device (155). 14. The device (100) of claim 13, wherein said operational recommendation comprises a graded indicator of a maintenance condition of said component (105). 15. The device (100) of claim 12, wherein said maintenance condition metric comprises a remaining useful life of said component (105). 16. The device (100) of claim 12, further comprising a housing (135) disposed around said flexible body (1 10). 17. The device (100) of claim 16, wherein lines (125, 130) are embedded in said flexible body (1 10) coupling said at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) to said processing complex (120). 18. The device (100) of claim 12, wherein said at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) comprises a strain gauge (1 15(4)), and said processing complex (120) is to process data from said at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) using said maintenance model (175) to estimate a wall thickness of said component (105). 19. The device (100) of claim 12, wherein said at least one data sensor (1 15) comprises a vibration sensor (1 15(1 )), and said processing complex (120) is to process data from said at least one data sensor (1 15) using said maintenance model (175) to determine a duty cycle of said component (105) and estimate a wall thickness of said component (105) based on said duty cycle. 20. The device (100) of claim 12, further comprising a location module (150) coupled to said flexible body (1 10), wherein said processing complex (120) is to receive location data from said location module (150) and transmit said location data to said remote system (180). 21 . The device (100) of claim 12, wherein said processing complex (120) is to process data from said at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) using said maintenance model to determine a maintenance condition metric for an additional component proximate said component. A method, comprising: coupling a sensing device (100) to a component (105), said sensing device (100) having a flexible body (1 10), at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) coupled to said flexible body (1 10), and an on-board processing complex (120) including a wireless communication device (155) coupled to said at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) and to said flexible body (1 10); processing data from said at least one non-intrusive data sensor (1 15) in said on-board processing complex (120) using a maintenance model (175) to determine a maintenance condition metric for said component (105), said maintenance condition metric including a remaining useful life metric; generating an operational recommendation based on said remaining useful life metric; and transmitting said operational recommendation to a remote system (180) using said wireless communication device (155).
